diaryStyle.container: position: relative; width: 200px; padding: 16px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff8e7 0%, #ffe4b5 100%); border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 2px 3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); transform: rotate(-2deg); font-family: 'KaiTi', serif;
diaryStyle.tape: position: absolute; top: -10px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 60px; height: 20px; background: rgba(255,200,100,0.6); transform: rotate(-3deg);

shareCard.layout: width: 400px; background: linear-gradient(145deg, #1a1a1a 0%, #2d1810 100%); border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(255,100,50,0.3);
shareCard.header: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px;
shareCard.title: font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold; color: #fff;
shareCard.badge: display: inline-block; padding: 4px 12px; background: #ff6b35; color: #fff; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 12px; margin-top: 4px;
shareCard.quote: background: rgba(255,107,53,0.15); border-left: 4px solid #ff6b35; padding: 16px; margin: 16px 0; border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
shareCard.stats: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 12px; margin: 20px 0;
shareCard.statItem: text-align: center; padding: 12px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius: 8px;
shareCard.footer: text-align: center; color: #666; font-size: 12px; margin-top: 16px; padding-top: 16px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);

topQuote.container: background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ff6b35, #ff9f1c); padding: 20px 24px; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 24px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
topQuote.text: font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; color: #fff; text-align: center; line-height: 1.4; text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);

painPoints.1: 键盘敲得比快门多，帖子发了几百楼，照片没拍满一张内存卡
painPoints.2: 参数调了半小时，回看照片差点睡着
painPoints.3: 后期是什么？JPG直出就是我对CCD最后的尊重
painPoints.4: 相机比照片贵， Leica快门声比成片更动听
painPoints.5: 发朋友圈确实专业，但教客户用手机确实更赚钱
painPoints.6: 追光少年，风雨无阻，日出日落修图到凌晨
painPoints.7: 拍了一套又一套，女朋友还是没有
painPoints.8: 决定性瞬间没拍到，决定性冲突拍了不少
painPoints.9: 爬山累半死，发片五分钟，后续p图两小时
painPoints.10: 什么活都接，什么钱都赚，什么风格都没有
painPoints.11: 器材收藏专家，实战能力为0
painPoints.12: 拍片五分钟，剪辑十小时，调色比玄学还玄
painPoints.13: 我本可以系列，硬盘里一堆差一点
painPoints.14: 纽摄倒背如流，出门只会Auto档
painPoints.15: 铁手天下无敌，成片和喝酒手抖一样
